POLICY BETA, NOT A PURE INPUT-COST BETA. Crude bought in USD; retail pricing was administered/politically frozen for material parts of the window (2017-18, 2021-22), so marketing margin compresses when crude rises. Under true daily pricing the sign would be neutral-to-positive (inventory gains). PRE-STATED RISK: expect sub-period sign instability.
